title: pt-ai Finding
description: One penetration-test finding. Stored one record per line (JSONL) in /engagements/{id}/findings.jsonl. The store is append-only; to update a finding, append a new line reusing its id — the latest line per id wins.

schema_version.description: Schema contract version. Bump when adding/removing fields.

id.description: Stable finding id, e.g. F-0001. Reuse the same id to update a finding.

target.description: Affected asset: ip, host, url, ARN, bucket, container, pod, etc.

category.description: Finding domain. Distinct from the bench scenario checkpoint categories.

phase.description: Engagement phase that produced the finding.

confidence.description: Analyst confidence BEFORE validation. Validation outcome lives in status.

status.description: Lifecycle state. reported=found, not yet validated; confirmed/false_positive=poc-validator outcome. Drives precision.

mitre.description: MITRE ATT&CK technique IDs, e.g. T1190 or T1021.002.

evidence.description: Paths to raw evidence files under the engagement dir. The propagation glue: report-generator cites these.

chain_id.description: Attack chain this finding belongs to.

source_agent.description: Agent that produced or last updated this record, e.g. vuln-scanner, poc-validator.

source_tool.description: Tool that produced the evidence, e.g. nmap, nuclei.
